result.reason: Addresses a critical bug causing VNC connections to display a white screen, rendering the VNC functionality unusable.
result.approach: Investigate VNC protocol initialization, particularly the ActiveX control (`AxCSC_ViewerXControl`) used for VNC display. Focus on its instantiation, property settings, event handling, and data rendering to identify why a blank screen is presented instead of the VNC session.
